# viettelidc_ovpc_subnet (Data Source)

Look up a single ViettelIDC subnet by id or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Subnet ID (vttSubnetId). Mutually optional with name.
- `name` (String) Subnet name. Mutually optional with id.
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `is_public_zone` (Boolean)
- `network_address` (String)
